action: Inbox lifecycle documentation: ADR 0008 + protocol doc update + CLAUDE.md operator commands
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c37 + c38 (docs reflect shipped behavior, not the plan). Scope (3 files, ~115 LoC, per doc-stewardship policy): (1) docs/architecture/inbox-injection-protocol.md MODIFY +50 LoC — add 'Lifecycle Implementation' section reflecting actual ship.sh post-commit hooks + inbox-mover.sh primitives + Triage Step 0a idempotency check + dispatcher startup recover-orphans hook. Correct the dead-letter persona instructions from c32 (the 'move to processed/cycle-N/' line in agents/evolve-triage.md that was unimplemented). Document the edge-case matrix from the plan. (2) docs/adr/0008-inbox-lifecycle-foolproof.md NEW ~50 LoC — Rejected alternatives: file-rename-on-ingest (Alt 1, harder to audit, no dir state separation), SQLite-backed inbox state (Alt 2, violates git-as-source-of-truth + adds binary dep), state.json:shippedTasks[] dual-write ledger (Alt 4, drift risk vs git), TTL-based auto-deletion (Alt 5, loses forensic trail). Accepted: three-layer defense with git log as single source of truth. Rationale for shipping Full c37 (all three layers in one cycle) vs sliced rollout per operator decision. (3) CLAUDE.md MODIFY +15 LoC — add 'Inbox Operator Commands (v9.X+)' section under existing Operator APIs: bash scripts/utility/inbox-audit.sh / inbox-reconcile.sh / inject-task.sh --force, with the canonical use cases for each.
